message:
test(ext): add negative policy conformance tests + extension benchmarks (bd-2ce, bd-1fg)

- 51 negative conformance tests: policy evaluate() across Strict/Prompt/Permissive modes,
  required_capability_for_host_call() mapping, integration tests loading JS extension
  that attempts denied hostcalls, JSONL report generation
- Extension benchmarks: policy evaluate, capability mapping, dispatch decision,
  protocol parse, extension load/init, tool call roundtrip, event hook dispatch,
  JS runtime cold start and warm eval

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
